docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-14-2020 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO JAN-12-2021 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 (W. TRUPEK 506)
REMARK: EXHIBITS DESTROYED PER THE JUNE 10,2021 ORDER.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE: $75.00 - SERVED JUN-19-2020, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SHARMA, OMESH
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,162.12 FILED BY LARKIN, JENNIFER AS TO DEFENDANT SHARMA, OMESH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-14-2020 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LARKIN, JENNIFER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SHARMA, OMESH $2,112.12 PRINCIPAL, $125.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,237.12, THE LEASE CONTRACT SECT 2.A & B ALLOWS PLAINTIFF TO PROVIDE AT LEAST 30 DAYS NOTICE TO TERMINATE MONTH-TO-MONTH LEASE AS "INTENDED TERMINATION DATE" IS REASONABLY INTERPRETED TO ALLOW AT LEAST 30 DAYS NOTICE BEFORE TERMINATION. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-12-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-12-2021 BY PANG LY. PLAINTIFF JENNIFER LARKIN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT OMESH SHARMA IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. COMMISSIONER: PANG LY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-12-2021 - JUDGMENT.
